Privacy Policy for Local PDF Toolkit

Last updated: April 12, 2026

Introduction

Thank you for choosing Local PDF Toolkit. Your privacy is our absolute priority. This extension is designed as a "privacy-first" utility, meaning it performs all complex PDF and image operations directly in your browser without ever sending your sensitive documents to any external server.

Our Core Privacy Principle

100% Client-Side. No Uploads. No Tracking. No Data Collection.

Scope of Features

The Local PDF Toolkit provides 19 professional tools that operate entirely within your local environment:

• Merge PDF
• Split PDF
• Rotate PDF
• Organize / Reorder
• Crop Pages
• Insert Blank Pages
• Image to PDF
• PDF to Image
• PDF to Text
• Grayscale PDF
• Compress PDF
• Image Resizer
• Page Numbers
• Watermark
• Edit Metadata
• Protect PDF
• Unlock PDF
• Flatten PDF
• PDF Info Inspector

Data Collection and Usage

We do not collect, store, or transmit any personal data or documents.

  • Local Processing: All processing is done using JavaScript libraries (like pdf-lib and pdf.js) within your browser's local sandbox. Your files never leave your computer.
  • No External Transmission: The extension's Content Security Policy (CSP) strictly prohibits connections to any remote server (connect-src 'none').
  • No Tracking: We do not use analytics, tracking pixels, or any third-party scripts that could monitor your activity.
  • No Personal Identification (PII): We do not collect names, emails, or hardware identifiers.

Permissions Usage

This extension requests only the minimum necessary permissions to function:

  • downloads: Required to save the processed PDF or image files directly to your device once an operation is complete.
  • storage: Used strictly to save your user preferences, such as Dark Mode settings and tool configurations, locally on your device.

Third-Party Services

This extension does not include any third-party analytics, advertisements, or tracking scripts. It is a strictly local tool.

Changes to This Policy

We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. Since we do not collect your contact information, we encourage you to check this page periodically for any updates.

Contact Us

If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the official support channels of ANSLATION COMPANY.

© 2026 Saurabh Tiwari and ANSLATION COMPANY. All rights reserved.
